name: ssh-ops
description: MCP and CLI helpers for running SSH-based server operations through reusable profiles.

interface.shortDescription: Run SSH inventory, health, disk, file, service, and log tasks.
interface.longDescription: SSH Ops exposes an MCP server and CLI for remote Linux server operations. Covers hardware inventory, health checks, disk reports, file read/write, systemd service control, and log search. Reuses the local ssh binary, existing SSH config, and optional profile files without storing passwords or private keys.
defaultPrompt: Check my server hardware with SSH Ops.
Show failed services on my SSH server.
Search nginx logs for errors in the last hour.
